  Log:
  SVN rev 179760 on 2008-06-12 15:21:13Z by flz

  - updating: terminating '\n' is not part of the package origin.
  - bump PKG_INSTALL_VERSION to 20080612.
  
  PR:             bin/119368 [1], bin/124459 [2]
